SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Noreen Byrne (415-823-3753) for Plaintiff Angela Leung who is also present.
Cyndi Rodriguez for Defendant Acclaim Credit Technologies.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the claim, exhibits and having heard oral argument takes the matter under submission. Exhibits retained by the Court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D.306)
